results.title: Helix: Descent N Ascent climbs onto Switch today
Velocity shuts out league’s top attack, extends winning streak to three
results.description: SPOKANE, Wash. — Spokane Velocity FC continued its hot streak Wednesday night, defeating Charlotte Independence 3-0 at ONE Spokane Stadium to earn its third consecutive victory and climb into fourth place in the USL League One standings.

results.title: Wall Street Zen Downgrades Fortrea (NASDAQ:FTRE) to Hold
results.description: Fortrea (NASDAQ:FTRE – Get Free Report) was downgraded by investment analysts at Wall Street Zen from a “buy” rating to a “hold” rating in a research report issued on Tuesday. Several other research analysts have also commented on the stock. Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft restated a “hold” rating and set a $14.00 price target on shares [...]
